data.title: Cyngn partners with Chandler Automation to offer autonomous DriveMod Tugger to agriculture sector.
data.description: In Mountain View, California, on December 23, 2025, Cyngn (Nasdaq: CYN) disclosed that Chandler Automation has become part of its dealer network. Chandler Automation will now provide Cyngn's autonomous DriveMod Tugger to food processors and packers in the agriculture sector. This move aims to enhance efficiency in agricultural operations. This partnership marks a significant step in the advancement of autonomous technology in industries, benefiting food processors and packers with improved productivity.

data.title: Keeper Security obtains FedRAMP® High Authorization, enhancing protection for high-impact federal systems. (Character count: 98)
data.description: Keeper Security has received authorization to enhance the protection of crucial federal systems with their top-tier Privileged Access Management (PAM) software. This authorization allows Keeper Security to safeguard high-impact federal systems. The company is renowned for its zero-trust and zero-knowledge PAM solutions. The authorization comes into effect as of December 23, 2025. This development signifies a significant milestone for Keeper Security, as it empowers them to further fortify critical federal systems with their advanced PAM technology.

data.title: Highway Holdings to acquire 51% of Regent-Feinbau Adermann GmbH based in Germany. Deal with LeMALe Beteiligungs-GmbH.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, in Hong Kong, Highway Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: HIHO) disclosed an agreement with LeMALe Beteiligungs-GmbH to purchase a majority stake of 51% in Regent-Feinbau Adermann GmbH, a company based in Germany. The deal is established through a letter of intent, marking a significant development for Highway Holdings in expanding its global presence.

data.title: Hyundai Motor Group leads in automotive safety awards with a total of 21 in 2025, with Hyundai Motor receiving 10, Genesis with 6, and Kia with 5.
data.description: In 2025, the Hyundai Motor Group has achieved a remarkable feat by obtaining a total of 21 prestigious TOP SAFETY PICK (TSP) and TOP SAFETY PICK+ (TSP+) awards, establishing itself as the automotive group with the highest number of awards for the second year in a row. Among the various brands under the Hyundai Motor Group, Hyundai Motor Company takes the lead with an impressive 10 TSP/TSP+ ratings, while Genesis follows closely with six awards, and Kia secures five awards. This extraordinary accomplishment reinforces the commitment of the Hyundai Motor Group to prioritizing safety in their vehicles and highlights their continued excellence in this critical aspect of automotive manufacturing.

data.title: Invivyd initiates Phase 3 DECLARATION trial of VYD2311, vaccine-alternative antibody for COVID prevention.
data.description: In New Haven, Connecticut, on December 23, 2025, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD) revealed the launch of the DECLARATION trial to assess VYD2311, a vaccine-alternative monoclonal antibody, aimed at preventing COVID. This Phase 3 trial, which is triple-blind and placebo-controlled, is pivotal for the company's Biologics License Application (BLA). The trial will investigate the efficacy and safety of VYD2311 in safeguarding against symptomatic COVID in a diverse participant pool comprising adults and adolescents.

data.title: Holiday shoppers defied economic challenges, with a 3.9% increase in spending from Nov. 1 to Dec. 21, as per a recent report.
data.description: Holiday spending this year saw a 3.9% increase compared to the same period last year, with consumers spending more from Nov. 1 to Dec. 21, as reported by Mastercard.

data.title: US holiday spending increased by 4.2% according to Visa analysis. No inflation adjustment made. #RetailInsights
data.description: In San Francisco, Visa (NYSE: V) unveiled its annual Retail Spend Monitor, compiled by Visa Consulting & Analytics (VCA), showcasing insights on U.S. holiday retail trends. Initial findings reveal a 4.2% rise in holiday retail spending from the previous year across various payment methods such as cash and check. These statistics do not account for inflation. This data captures the diverse spending behaviors, from tech upgrades to wardrobe refreshes, showcasing a positive trend in consumer spending during the holiday season.

data.title: TON price expected to reach $2.15 in Jan 2026 with oversold RSI and bullish MACD signals, support at $1.42.
data.description: Analysis of Toncoin's technical indicators indicate that the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is currently in oversold territory, while a bullish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) divergence is emerging. These conditions are suggesting a potential price recovery to $2.15 over the next 4-6 weeks. It is important to note that there is critical support at $1.42, which may act as a key level in the event of a price decline.

data.title: Gundry MD Bio Complete 3 has 2,400+ positive reviews for improved digestion, energy, and gut health. Dr. Gundry's formula is transforming gut health.
data.description: Doctor Steven Gundry's innovative Probiotic, Prebiotic, and Postbiotic "Triple-Action" Formula is revolutionizing gut health and enhancing overall well-being. The product, Gundry MD® Bio Complete 3™, created by Dr. Steven Gundry, a renowned heart surgeon and gut health specialist, is gaining traction in the market. The formula aims to improve digestive health using a unique combination of beneficial microbes, fibers, and nutrients. This product, launched in Los Angeles on December 23, 2025, is making an impact with remarkable results.

data.title: Jeffs’ Brands is changing focus from e-commerce to homeland security & advanced tech in corporate rebranding.
data.description: A company is planning to transition its strategic focus from e-commerce to homeland security and advanced technologies. This shift will involve reallocating resources and investments to bolster activities related to national security and cutting-edge technologies. It signifies a significant change in the company's direction, indicating a shift in priorities and objectives. This move reflects a trend where companies are increasingly recognizing the importance of investing in security and advanced technologies to stay competitive and address evolving threats.

data.title: AECOM chosen as preferred bidder for Scottish Water’s multi-billion-dollar Enterprise Alliance, a 13-year investment program.
data.description: AECOM, a global infrastructure leader (NYSE:ACM), has been chosen as a preferred bidder for Scottish Water's new Enterprise Alliance. This project is part of a multi-billion-dollar investment program set to last up to 13 years aimed at improving water and wastewater infrastructure in Scotland. The Enterprise Alliance is Scottish Water's most significant project to date, as the publicly-owned utility looks to enhance fresh water supply and wastewater management in the region.

data.title: AI applications in commercial vehicles market to grow from 2024-2029. Focus on telematics, connected vehicles. Challenges include regulations, capex.
data.description: A recent report titled "AI and its Application in the Commercial Vehicles Market, Global, 2024-2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com. The report delves into the potential impact of artificial intelligence (AI) on the commercial vehicle (CV) sector worldwide. It highlights the transformative possibilities of AI technology within the industry while also addressing obstacles hindering growth such as complex regulations, substantial capital investments, and integration challenges, leading to a comprehensive analysis of AI's role in the sector.

data.title: USANA Foundation donates 5,100+ food bags to support Utah children and families during winter break.
data.description: Over 5,100 food packages were distributed in Salt Lake City on December 23, 2025, to provide assistance to children during the winter break. While the holiday period is typically associated with festivities, it can pose challenges for numerous youngsters reliant on school meals. The initiative aims to alleviate the uncertainties that come with extended school breaks by ensuring children have access to essential nutrition.

data.title: Expected SHIB price rally to $0.0000285 by year-end, 10-15% increase within 7 days. RSI at 34.66 signals oversold.
data.description: Analysts are predicting a possible 10-15% increase in SHIB's price, potentially reaching a target of $0.0000285 within the next 7 days. This forecast is supported by the Relative Strength Index (RSI) currently at 34.66, indicating oversold conditions. Additionally, the observed increase in whale activity adds to the optimism surrounding SHIB's price movement.

data.title: ATIS acquires Bayline Lift Technologies, expanding elevator inspection services in the Mid-Atlantic region. Strong growth expected.
data.description: St. Louis-based private equity firm Thompson Street Capital Partners (TSCP) revealed the purchase of Bayline Lift Technologies (Bayline) by ATIS, a TSCP portfolio company specializing in elevator and escalator safety inspections, consulting, and managed services in North America. Bayline offers elevator inspection services in the Mid-Atlantic region. The acquisition is expected to propel Bayline's growth, leveraging ATIS' expertise and support.
